title: Added stream support to Container.exec_run().
body: Added support for streaming output in Container.exec_run(). Streaming functionality should support demuxed output if specified. Return format should match docker's python library.

comments.body: I would say that once the comments are addressed we are good to merge. The PR is in a very nice shape now 😃
@MattBelle any update on the open conversations? :)
